DEMO1_S1_L1.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L1.text: It's been almost ten years since the last time I came here.

DEMO1_S1_L2.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L2.text: This place is still the same as I remember…

DEMO1_S1_L3.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L3.text: And yet it also feels different ever since they passed away.

DEMO1_S1_L4.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L4.text: Now it’s my job to reopen this place after being closed for almost a year.

DEMO1_S1_L5.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L5.text: I hope I can bring this place back to life, I hope I can live up to my parents’ reputation,...

DEMO1_S1_L6.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L6.text: And I hope… I can make up for the mistakes I’ve made all these years.

DEMO1_S1_L7.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_S1_L7.text: So… you really want to reopen this place, huh?

DEMO1_S1_L9.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_S1_L9.text: Cut the small talk. I only came to make sure you’re serious about reopening this place.

DEMO1_S1_L10.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L10.text: There’s no way I’d joke around. This is our parent's place.

DEMO1_S1_L11.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L11.text: I’ve got everything ready. I even went around and met the locals to promote the reopening.

DEMO1_S1_L12.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_S1_L12.text: Oh, really? If you’ve got everything ready… Did you restock the ingredients to open the shop?

DEMO1_S1_L13.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L13.text: Ah! I… I forgot. I only restocked the drinks.

DEMO1_S1_L15.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_S1_L15.text: Since this is just the demo, the shops in the market aren’t open yet.

DEMO1_S1_L16.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_S1_L16.text: So I’ll bring you the ingredients for now. Here…

DEMO1_S1_L20.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_S1_L20.text: Remember! Once the full game is released, you’ll have to buy the ingredients yourself at the market.

DEMO1_S1_L21.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_S1_L21.text: For now, I’ll keep resupplying this place to make sure you have the best ingredients every day…

DEMO1_S1_L22.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_S1_L22.text: So we'll know exactly who to blame if this place fails.

DEMO1_S1_L24.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L24.text: Looks like it’s going to take a while to fix our bond.

DEMO1_S1_L25.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L25.text: But if I can show $$her|him$$ that I’m serious about running this place…

DEMO1_S1_L26.name: %player%
DEMO1_S1_L26.text: I’m sure $$she|he$$’ll give me a chance to explain everything.

DEMO1_2_S1_L3.name: %player%
DEMO1_2_S1_L3.text: Yesterday was not as good as I expected. But I should get the place ready so we can draw in more customers.

DEMO1_2_S1_L9.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_2_S1_L9.text: Looks like it’s not just your brain that’s missing, your sense of time too.

DEMO1_2_S1_L10.name: %player%
DEMO1_2_S1_L10.text: Hehehe… sorry. I overslept after opening the shop yesterday.

DEMO1_2_S1_L17.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_2_S1_L17.text: That’s Shoyu. The seasoning that Dad always asked me to buy.

DEMO1_2_S1_L21.name: %player%
DEMO1_2_S1_L21.text: But honestly… I feel pretty satisfied. Reopening this place feels like the right way to honor Dad.

DEMO1_2_S1_L23.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_2_S1_L23.text: If you want to honor him…

DEMO1_2_S1_L25.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_2_S1_L25.text: WHERE WERE YOU DURING DAD’S NGABEN CEREMONY?

DEMO1_2_S1_L26.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_2_S1_L26.text: WHERE WERE YOU WHEN HE WAS CARRIED TO THE CREMATION GROUND?

DEMO1_2_S1_L28.name: BUTTON2
DEMO1_2_S1_L28.text: Believe me, I wanted to come. But… - (Regret)

DEMO1_2_S1_L29.name: BUTTON3
DEMO1_2_S1_L29.text: I was on an official mission. Hehehe. - (Joking)

DEMO2COLD_S1_L1.name: %player%
DEMO2COLD_S1_L1.text: Even if I told you what happened...

DEMO2COLD_S1_L2.name: BUTTON1
DEMO2COLD_S1_L2.text: It wouldn't change the fact that I didn't come to Dad's funeral. - (Regret)

DEMO2WARM_S1_L0.name: %player%
DEMO2WARM_S1_L0.text: Believe me, I wanted to come. But…

DEMO2WARM_S1_L1.name: %sibling%
DEMO2WARM_S1_L1.text: But what? Was there something more important than your own father’s funeral?

DEMO2PLAYFULL_S1_L0.name: %player%
DEMO2PLAYFULL_S1_L0.text: I was on an official mission. Hehehe…

DEMO2PLAYFULL_S1_L2.name: %sibling%
DEMO2PLAYFULL_S1_L2.text: You think losing Dad was a joke?!

DEMO2PLAYFULL_S1_L3.name: %player%
DEMO2PLAYFULL_S1_L3.text: What? No! That’s not what I meant. I just...

DEMO2PLAYFULL_S1_L4.name: BUTTON1
DEMO2PLAYFULL_S1_L4.text: I tried to ease the mood. - (Lighten the mood)

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L1.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L1.text: Do you even remember how long you’ve been gone?

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L3.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L3.text: Ten years you vanished without a single word… Then suddenly you just show up and decide to reopen Dad’s izakaya.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L4.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L4.text: And now you decide to apologize? That’s rich!

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L6.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L6.text: You’re right. I don’t expect to be forgiven that easily.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L7.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L7.text: But… give me a chance to fix it.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L8.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L8.text: I know you’ve sacrificed a lot to take care of Dad.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L9.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L9.text: Dad told me everything when I called him in the hospital a few months ago.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L10.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L10.text: He said you withdrew from the residency program just to look after him, sacrificing your opportunity to become Psionologist.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L11.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L11.text: Dad was also worried you’d leave the hospital because the izakaya had been left closed for too long.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L12.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L12.text: That’s why I quit the Nusantara Police Department and came back here.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L13.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L13.text: I’ll run our parents’ izakaya so you can focus on your career.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L14.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L14.text: Ugh… Did you think my career was over because I was taking care of dad?

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L15.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L15.text: I can still be a psionologist you know!

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L16.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L16.text: In fact, I know some senior doctors who could guide me to become a psionologist.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L17.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L17.text: So, if guilt is the only reason you reopen Oasis, then you should GO BACK TO YOUR BARRACKS!

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L19.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L19.text: It will take a lot of time to make $$her|him$$ accept me again.

ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L20.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE2_S1_L20.text: Well… Let's just take it one step at a time.

DEMO1_3_S1_L2.name: %player%
DEMO1_3_S1_L2.text: Alright! Brand new day, brand new opportunity!

DEMO1_3_S1_L3.name: %player%
DEMO1_3_S1_L3.text: I should get the shop ready.

DEMO1_3_S1_L10.name: %player%
DEMO1_3_S1_L10.text: Well, considering what happened yesterday… It’s not surprising $$she|he$$ didn’t show up.

DEMO1_3_S1_L12.name: %player%
DEMO1_3_S1_L12.text: I guess I was wrong. $$She|He$$ still came by to drop off some stocks.

DEMO1_4_S1_L13.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L13.text: No, I won’t be long. I just…

DEMO1_4_S1_L14.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L14.text: I didn’t expect you’d actually run this place. I thought you'd run away and secretly sold this place.

DEMO1_4_S1_L15.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L15.text: Turn out you are doing quite well.

DEMO1_4_S1_L16.name: %player%
DEMO1_4_S1_L16.text: I’m glad people keep coming back here.

DEMO1_4_S1_L17.name: %player%
DEMO1_4_S1_L17.text: Maybe it won’t be long before this place is back to its glory days. Hehe…

DEMO1_4_S1_L18.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L18.text: This is nothing compared to when Dad was running this place.

DEMO1_4_S1_L19.name: %player%
DEMO1_4_S1_L19.text: You… really don’t trust me, huh?

DEMO1_4_S1_L20.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L20.text: If your $$big brother|little sister$$ disappeared for ten years and suddenly came back to take over your parents’ business…

DEMO1_4_S1_L23.name: %player%
DEMO1_4_S1_L23.text: Listen, I’m sorry for leaving you all these years. But when Mom passed away, I…

DEMO1_4_S1_L24.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L24.text: Please, %player%. You weren’t the only one in pain.

DEMO1_4_S1_L25.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L25.text: Dad and I were in pain too.

DEMO1_4_S1_L26.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L26.text: But we didn’t run away and abandon our family for ten years.

DEMO1_4_S1_L28.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L28.text: Did you know these past two years, I had to watch Dad’s health crumble?

DEMO1_4_S1_L29.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L29.text: Day after day, I took care of him all by myself.

DEMO1_4_S1_L30.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L30.text: And when he was gone… I was the only one standing there. Alone.

DEMO1_4_S1_L31.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L31.text: Can you even imagine what I went through?

DEMO1_4_S1_L35.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L35.text: And now, just when I’ve finally learned to move on… you suddenly show up like nothing ever happened.

DEMO1_4_S1_L36.name: %player%
DEMO1_4_S1_L36.text: I’m sorry. I’ve wanted to contact you for years...

DEMO1_4_S1_L37.name: %player%
DEMO1_4_S1_L37.text: But, I didn’t have your contact.

DEMO1_4_S1_L38.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_4_S1_L38.text: If you hadn’t left, you wouldn’t have needed it!

DEMO1_4_S1_L42.name: BUTTON2
DEMO1_4_S1_L42.text: Please… just give me one last chance. - (Pleading)

DEMO3COLD_S1_L1.name: %player%
DEMO3COLD_S1_L1.text: I understand if you can’t trust me right away…

DEMO3COLD_S1_L2.name: %player%
DEMO3COLD_S1_L2.text: But I swear I’ll fix everything.

DEMO3COLD_S1_L3.name: BUTTON1
DEMO3COLD_S1_L3.text: Both this place... and our bond. - (Somber)

DEMO3COLD_S1_L4.name: BUTTON2
DEMO3COLD_S1_L4.text: I want to make things the way they used to be. - (Sincere)

DEMO3WARM_S1_L0.name: %player%
DEMO3WARM_S1_L0.text: Please… just give me one last chance.

DEMO3WARM_S1_L1.name: %player%
DEMO3WARM_S1_L1.text: I know I’ve messed up, $$Sis|Bro$$. But please, let me set things right.

DEMO3WARM_S1_L2.name: %player%
DEMO3WARM_S1_L2.text: I just want us to laugh together again...

DEMO3WARM_S1_L3.name: BUTTON1
DEMO3WARM_S1_L3.text: Just like when the izakaya was filled with people. - (Reminiscent)

DEMO3WARM_S1_L4.name: BUTTON2
DEMO3WARM_S1_L4.text: Was that too much to ask? - (Wishful)

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L1.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L1.text: Do whatever you want. It’s not like I can stop you anyway.

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L2.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L2.text: Legally speaking, dad leaves this place for you after all.

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L4.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L4.text: It feels good seeing Mom and Dad’s place filled with customers again.

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L6.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L6.text: I’ll keep bringing the supplies for this shop…

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L7.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L7.text: But that doesn’t mean I’ve forgiven you!

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L8.name: %sibling%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L8.text: I just didn’t want this place to end up empty again!

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L10.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L10.text: Well, that’s a small step forward. However, there’s still a long way to go from here.

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L11.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L11.text: The demo ends here for now, but you’re free to continue opening the shop if you want to keep playing.

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L12.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L12.text: I’d really appreciate any feedback or thoughts you have about this demo… And I hope you enjoyed it.

ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L13.name: %player%
ENDDEMOCHOICE3_S1_L13.text: Thank you for playing! And don’t forget to wishlist our game.

DEMO1_5_S1_L2.name: %player%
DEMO1_5_S1_L2.text: Alright! Brand new day, brand new opportunity!

DEMO1_5_S1_L3.name: %player%
DEMO1_5_S1_L3.text: I should get the shop ready.

DEMO1_5_S1_L9.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_5_S1_L9.text: Morning, I came to restock your ingredients.

DEMO1_5_S1_L13.name: %sibling%
DEMO1_5_S1_L13.text: Yeah… I should get going. My shift starts soon.
